# Skylanex

> Skylanex is an independent AI software studio — we design, build, and ship intelligent applications, from custom AI apps to machine learning, NLP, and computer vision.

Skylanex is an independent AI software studio led by Brandon Sanders. We design and build websites, web and mobile apps, custom CRMs, dashboards, AI assistants, and e-commerce storefronts, and provide AI services from machine learning and NLP to computer vision. Contact: info@skylanex.com.

## Services
- [AI Application Development](https://www.skylanex.com/ai-application-development): We design and ship production-grade AI applications tailored to how your business really works — not a one-size-fits-all template.
- [Machine Learning & Data Science](https://www.skylanex.com/machine-learning-data-science): We build models and data pipelines that turn raw data into forecasts, classifications, and recommendations you can act on.
- [Intelligent Process Automation](https://www.skylanex.com/intelligent-process-automation): We combine LLMs, rules, and integrations to automate document processing, routing, and repetitive workflows end to end.
- [AI Consulting & Strategy](https://www.skylanex.com/ai-consulting-strategy): We help you identify high-value AI opportunities, assess feasibility, and build a pragmatic roadmap you can execute.
- [Natural Language Processing](https://www.skylanex.com/natural-language-processing): We build NLP systems for semantic search, summarization, classification, extraction, and conversational assistants grounded in your data.
- [Computer Vision Solutions](https://www.skylanex.com/computer-vision-solutions): We build computer-vision systems for detection, recognition, quality inspection, and visual analytics — on the cloud or the edge.

## Design & build solutions
- [Website Design](https://www.skylanex.com/solutions#website): Fast, modern marketing sites designed around the one action your business needs a visitor to take — with the credibility to earn it in the first three seconds.
- [App Design & Development](https://www.skylanex.com/solutions#app): From dashboards to full SaaS products and native-feel mobile apps — designed around real workflows and built production-grade on modern infrastructure.
- [CRM & Customer Platforms](https://www.skylanex.com/solutions#crm): Custom CRMs, sales pipelines, and client portals shaped to how you actually sell and serve — wired to the tools you already run.
- [Dashboards & Analytics](https://www.skylanex.com/solutions#dashboard): BI dashboards, admin panels, and reporting interfaces that turn scattered numbers into the handful of metrics that actually move the business.
- [AI Assistants & Chat](https://www.skylanex.com/solutions#ai-chat): Conversational assistants and copilots that answer from your content with citations — embedded in your product or standing on their own.
- [E-commerce Storefronts](https://www.skylanex.com/solutions#ecommerce): Fast, beautiful storefronts with frictionless catalog, cart, and checkout — built to sell on mobile and keep customers coming back.

## Website solutions by industry
- [Law Firm Web Design](https://www.skylanex.com/solutions/law-firms): Custom law firm website design and development — practice-area architecture, intake that routes, bar-compliant disclaimers, and local SEO. See six original law firm design concepts.
- [Medical & Dental Web Design](https://www.skylanex.com/solutions/medical-dental): Custom medical and dental website design — online scheduling, insurance transparency, patient intake, and local SEO. See six original healthcare design concepts.
